prompt: Create a single 2D game map prop: a long old wooden table for a dark shrine/forest platformer. Match a hand-painted, pixel-inspired Godot 2D game style: aged dark brown wooden planks, worn edges, slightly uneven legs, faint moss/dust, subtle scratches, muted highlights, crisp readable silhouette, low texture noise. The table should be long and horizontal, about 3.5 to 4 times wider than tall, sturdy and old, suitable as an interactable environmental object in a shrine storeroom or abandoned forest lodge. Front-facing 2D side/platformer prop view with a slight visible top surface, not isometric. Single asset only, no animation grid, no frame borders. Background must be 100% solid flat magenta #FF00FF, no gradients, no shadow under the prop, no text, no labels, no UI. The entire table must fit fully inside the canvas with generous magenta margin on all sides; no tabletop edge, leg, moss strand, or detail may touch or cross the image edge. Do not make chunky retro pixel art; use clean hand-painted HD / pixel-inspired game asset style consistent with dark forest tiles.
